playbooks.title: CI Adoption Recovery Motion
playbooks.next_best_action: Enroll customer engineering leads into the CI reliability webinar and schedule a 30-minute debrief.

playbooks.title: Secure Baseline Rollout Motion
playbooks.next_best_action: Run secure lab invitation campaign and track conversion to active scan coverage.

playbooks.title: Platform Adoption Optimization Motion
